overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a warrior character exploring an ancient Egyptian city. The character walks through narrow stone alleys, ascends a grand staircase, and emerges into sunlit plazas and ceremonial avenues lined with palm trees, obelisks, and classical monuments.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone alley between high walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow stone alleyway between high walls lined with flowering bushes

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green tunic walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall beige stone wall with horizontal carved lines casting shadows
ancient weathered stone building wall with climbing vegetation
lush green bushes with red and yellow flowers along the wall base
uneven sandstone tile pathway with grass growing between cracks

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed alley with high stone walls on both sides. Flowering bushes line the right wall while a few pedestrians walk in the opposite direction. The ground consists of uneven stone tiles bathed in bright midday sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep stone staircase between high walls

events.description: approaching and beginning to ascend a long stone staircase between walls
character begins climbing the stairs, changing elevation and camera angle upward

agents.ego_description: climbing a long stone staircase between high walls, moving toward the bright sunlight at the top

notable_agents.action: man in blue tunic descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: long flight of worn stone steps ascending steeply between walls
grand building with tall blue painted columns and gold trim visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep stone staircase flanked by high walls, transitioning from the narrow alley upward toward a brighter area. An ornate building with blue columns becomes visible at the top. A pedestrian descends the stairs as the camera climbs steadily.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper city plaza with ornate buildings and acacia trees

events.description: exiting the stairway into an open plaza with classical architecture and large trees

agents.ego_description: walking through a sunlit plaza with large acacia trees and classical Egyptian architecture

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking across the path from right to left

entered.detail: large spreading acacia tree with flat canopy providing shade over the path
decorative stone balustrade wall with carved circular patterns on top
tall stone obelisk with hieroglyphic carvings visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the character enters a sunlit plaza featuring a grand building with blue columns on the left and a large acacia tree ahead. The space opens up to reveal distant monuments including an obelisk. Pedestrians walk through the area as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand ceremonial avenue with monuments and palm trees

events.description: entering a wide ceremonial avenue lined with palm trees and ancient monuments
camel with rider crosses the street from right to left ahead of the character

agents.ego_description: walking along a grand avenue lined with palm trees, passing obelisks and sphinx statues

notable_agents.action: camel with rider crossing the street from right to left
child in green tunic standing near the street edge watching the camel

entered.detail: avenue lined with tall date palm trees on both sides
large stone sphinx statue on a pedestal beside the road
distant temple entrance with domed roof and columns visible at the end of the avenue

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a grand ceremonial avenue lined with palm trees and ancient monuments. An obelisk stands prominently on the left while a large sphinx statue sits beside the road. A camel crosses the street ahead, and the distant temple gate is visible at the end of the avenue.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the confinement of a narrow stone alley into the expansive grandeur of a ceremonial Egyptian avenue. It begins by following the character through a tight corridor of high stone walls and flowering bushes under bright midday sunlight. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts upward along a steep stone staircase, climbing past descending pedestrians toward the glimpse of an ornate building with blue columns. The space then opens wide into a sunlit plaza featuring a large acacia tree and distant monuments before the camera glides onto a broad avenue. Finally, the view expands further to reveal a landscape of palm trees, a prominent obelisk, and a sphinx statue, following the path toward a distant temple gate as a camel crosses the road.
